name: Possible Suspicious Invocation of IIS Process Worker
description: Detects possible suspicious invocation of IIS Process Worker w3wp in relation to the MSExchangeOWAAppPool Outlook Web App Application pool to spawn LOLBINs in system32 and syswow64 directory for potential suspicious activity.

filterSets.name: Possible Suspicious Invocation of IIS Process Worker

author: John Paul Lim
